metadata.description: Visual node-graph editor for composing Morpho lending strategies. Plug it into Claude Code with the Morpho MCP and let any agent build a strategy and hand the user a deep-link URL to verify before signing.

plugins.name: morpheus
plugins.description: [Beta] Build Morpho lending strategies as visual node graphs. Compose with @morpho-org/morpho-skills (the Morpho MCP) to let agents prep a strategy and hand the user a Morpheus deep-link URL.
